abilities.name: Steadfast
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon flinches, its Speed stat is boosted by
1 stage.

abilities.name: Sharpness
abilities.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s slicing moves by 50%.

hidden_ability.name: Justified
hidden_ability.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a Dark-type move, its
Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.

ability.name: Inner Focus
ability.description:
The Pokémon never flinches when attacked and is unaffected
by Intimidate.

The Pokémon never flinches when attacked and is unaffected
by Intimidate.
